item.title: recently-updated
item.description: 📄 Recently Updated Notes Windshield wiper index Unfamiliar techniques Fireman throw Double leg Single leg README Baseball choke Armbar Close guard overhook stiff .

item.title: Side control
item.description: Can lead to Knee on belly, which has finishes Can be progressed to Mount You can also Gift wrap Windshield wiper choke Opponent on the receiving end is pushing toward with stiff arm.

item.title: Granby roll
item.description: When in Turtle and opponent is on side and not applying constant pressure you can roll over shoulder that is on the opponents side and regain Open guard.

item.title: Knee on belly defence
item.description: Try Always start with side -idea to see if the knee can be loosened.

item.title: Lapel choke defence
item.description: When opponent has from behind your lapel gripped they are always trying to move their elbow behind your back and you should aim to eliminate that movement, either by handfighting or going to a side.

item.title: Mount Defence
item.description: Always start with getting on side.

item.title: Always start with side
item.description: Ideally when on the bottom on your back every movement should start with movement to a slight side tilt.

item.title: Center line
item.description: Imagine that you have a direct line outward from the center of your torso. That is zone where you can influence your opponent the most.

item.title: Constant pressure
item.description: When in Knee on belly, Turtle, Mount your need to remember to apply constant pressure to prevent opponent from moving and giving them ground for free.
